customGet.allow get method for a custom path with: var response = await client.CustomGetAsync("test/minimal");

createAgent.createAgent with all parameters:
response, err := client.CreateAgent(client.NewApiCreateAgentRequest(
  agentStudio.NewEmptyAgentConfigCreate().
    SetName("test-agent").
    SetDescription("A test agent for CTS").
    SetProviderId("5e33d805-7892-4329-bda7-b524dc3fd04a").
    SetModel("gpt-4").
    SetInstructions("You are a helpful assistant.").
    SetConfig(map[string]any{"sendUsage": true, "sendReasoning": true, "temperature": 0.7, "max_tokens": 1500}).
    SetTools(
      []agentStudio.ItemsUnion{*agentStudio.StartPartAsItemsUnion(
        agentStudio.NewEmptyStartPart().SetType("start"))}),
))
if err != nil {
  // handle the eventual error
  panic(err)
}

createAgentCompletion.createAgentCompletion with test configur:
response, err := client.CreateAgentCompletion(client.NewApiCreateAgentCompletionRequest(
  "785b14e4-61a8-4c03-8028-bf2ba3ae85ff", agentStudio.CompatibilityMode("ai-sdk-4"),
  agentStudio.NewEmptyAgentCompletionRequest().SetMessages(agentStudio.ArrayOfMessageV4AsMessagesUnion(
    []agentStudio.MessageV4{*agentStudio.UserMessageV4AsMessageV4(
      agentStudio.NewEmptyUserMessageV4().SetRole("user").SetContent("Hello"))})).SetConfiguration(
    agentStudio.NewEmptyAgentTestConfiguration().
      SetInstructions("Test instructions override").
      SetConfig(map[string]any{"temperature": 0.2}).
      SetTools(
        []agentStudio.ItemsUnion{*agentStudio.StartPartAsItemsUnion(
          agentStudio.NewEmptyStartPart().SetType("start"))}),
  ),
))
if err != nil {
  // handle the eventual error
  panic(err)
}

updateAgent.updateAgent with all parameters:
response, err := client.UpdateAgent(client.NewApiUpdateAgentRequest(
  "785b14e4-61a8-4c03-8028-bf2ba3ae85ff",
  agentStudio.NewEmptyAgentConfigUpdate().
    SetName("updated-agent").
    SetDescription("Updated description").
    SetProviderId("new-provider-id").
    SetModel("gpt-4o").
    SetInstructions("Updated instructions.").
    SetConfig(map[string]any{"temperature": 0.5}).
    SetTools(
      []agentStudio.ItemsUnion{*agentStudio.StartPartAsItemsUnion(
        agentStudio.NewEmptyStartPart().SetType("start"))}),
))
if err != nil {
  // handle the eventual error
  panic(err)
}

createProvider.createProvider with Azure OpenAI:
ProviderAuthenticationResponse response = client.createProvider(
  new ProviderAuthenticationCreate()
    .setName("My Azure Provider")
    .setProviderName(ProviderName.AZURE_OPENAI)
    .setInput(
      new AzureOpenAIProviderInput()
        .setApiKey("az-test-key-5678")
        .setAzureEndpoint("https://my-resource.openai.azure.com")
        .setAzureDeployment("gpt-4o")
    )
);

customGet.allow get method for a custom path with: Object response = client.customGet("test/minimal");

createAgent.createAgent with minimal parameters: const response = await client.createAgent({ name: 'test-agent', instructions: 'You are a helpful assistant.' });

customDelete.allow del method for a custom path with: const response = await client.customDelete({ path: 'test/all', parameters: { query: 'parameters' } });

customGet.allow get method for a custom path with: const response = await client.customGet({ path: 'test/minimal' });
const response = await client.customGet({ path: 'test/all', parameters: { query: 'parameters with space' } });

listAgents.list agents with all parameters: const response = await client.listAgents({ page: 2, limit: 5, providerId: '5e33d805-7892-4329-bda7-b524dc3fd04a' });
listAgents.e2e list agents: const response = await client.listAgents({ page: 1, limit: 2 });

listProviders.listProviders with pagination: const response = await client.listProviders({ page: 2, limit: 5 });
listProviders.e2e list providers: const response = await client.listProviders({ page: 1, limit: 2 });

init.default:
// Replace 'us' with your Algolia Application Region
const client = agentStudioClient('ALGOLIA_APPLICATION_ID', 'ALGOLIA_API_KEY', 'us');

createAgent.createAgent with all parameters:
var response =
  client.createAgent(
    agentConfigCreate =
      AgentConfigCreate(
        name = "test-agent",
        description = "A test agent for CTS",
        providerId = "5e33d805-7892-4329-bda7-b524dc3fd04a",
        model = "gpt-4",
        instructions = "You are a helpful assistant.",
        config =
          buildJsonObject {
            put("sendUsage", JsonPrimitive(true))
            put("sendReasoning", JsonPrimitive(true))
            put("temperature", JsonPrimitive(0.7))
            put("max_tokens", JsonPrimitive(1500))
          },
        tools = listOf(StartPart(type = "start")),
      )
  )

createAgentCompletion.createAgentCompletion with v5 messages a:
var response =
  client.createAgentCompletion(
    agentId = "785b14e4-61a8-4c03-8028-bf2ba3ae85ff",
    compatibilityMode = CompatibilityMode.entries.first { it.value == "ai-sdk-5" },
    agentCompletionRequest =
      AgentCompletionRequest(
        messages =
          MessagesUnion.ofListOfMessageV5(
            listOf(
              UserMessageV5(
                role = "user",
                parts = listOf(TextPartV5(type = "text", text = "What is Algolia?")),
              )
            )
          ),
        id = "test-conversation-id",
      ),
    stream = false,
    cache = false,
    memory = false,
  )
createAgentCompletion.createAgentCompletion with test configur:
var response =
  client.createAgentCompletion(
    agentId = "785b14e4-61a8-4c03-8028-bf2ba3ae85ff",
    compatibilityMode = CompatibilityMode.entries.first { it.value == "ai-sdk-4" },
    agentCompletionRequest =
      AgentCompletionRequest(
        messages =
          MessagesUnion.ofListOfMessageV4(
            listOf(UserMessageV4(role = "user", content = "Hello"))
          ),
        configuration =
          AgentTestConfiguration(
            instructions = "Test instructions override",
            config = buildJsonObject { put("temperature", JsonPrimitive(0.2)) },
            tools = listOf(StartPart(type = "start")),
          ),
      ),
  )

            apiKey = "az-test-key-5678",

            azureDeployment = "gpt-4o",
          ),
      )
  )

customPost.requestOptions can override default quer:
var response =
  client.customPost(
    path = "test/requestOptions",
    parameters = mapOf("query" to "parameters"),
    body = buildJsonObject { put("facet", JsonPrimitive("filters")) },
    requestOptions =
      RequestOptions(urlParameters = buildMap { put("query", "myQueryParameter") }),
  )

    appId = "ALGOLIA_APPLICATION_ID",
    apiKey = "ALGOLIA_API_KEY",

import.default:
from algoliasearch.agent_studio.client import AgentStudioClientSync
from json import loads

listAgentConversations.listAgentConversations with all paramete:
response = client.list_agent_conversations(
    agent_id="785b14e4-61a8-4c03-8028-bf2ba3ae85ff",

init.default:
# In an asynchronous context, you can use AgentStudioClient instead, which exposes the exact same methods.
client = AgentStudioClientSync(
    "ALGOLIA_APPLICATION_ID", "ALGOLIA_API_KEY", "ALGOLIA_APPLICATION_REGION"
)

createAgent.createAgent with all parameters:
response = client.create_agent(
  Algolia::AgentStudio::AgentConfigCreate.new(
    name: "test-agent",
    description: "A test agent for CTS",
    provider_id: "5e33d805-7892-4329-bda7-b524dc3fd04a",
    model: "gpt-4",
    instructions: "You are a helpful assistant.",
    config: {sendUsage: true, sendReasoning: true, temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 1500},
    tools: [Algolia::AgentStudio::StartPart.new(type: "start")]
  )
)

val response = Await.result(
  client.createProvider(
    providerAuthenticationCreate = ProviderAuthenticationCreate(
      name = "My Azure Provider",
      providerName = ProviderName.withName("azure_openai"),
      input = AzureOpenAIProviderInput(
        apiKey = "az-test-key-5678",
        azureEndpoint = "https://my-resource.openai.azure.com",
        azureDeployment = "gpt-4o"
      )
    )
  ),
  Duration(100, "sec")
)

customGet.requestOptions should be escaped too:
val response = Await.result(
  client.customGet[JObject](
    path = "test/all",
    parameters = Some(Map("query" -> "to be overridden")),
    requestOptions = Some(
      RequestOptions
        .builder()
        .withQueryParameter("query", "parameters with space")
        .withQueryParameter("and an array", Seq("array", "with spaces"))
        .withHeader("x-header-1", "spaces are left alone")
        .build()
    )
  ),
  Duration(100, "sec")
)

init.default:
val client = AgentStudioClient(
  appId = "ALGOLIA_APPLICATION_ID",
  apiKey = "ALGOLIA_API_KEY",
  region = "ALGOLIA_APPLICATION_REGION"
)

createAgent.createAgent with all parameters:
let response = try await client.createAgent(agentConfigCreate: AgentConfigCreate(
    name: "test-agent",
    description: "A test agent for CTS",
    providerId: "5e33d805-7892-4329-bda7-b524dc3fd04a",
    model: "gpt-4",
    instructions: "You are a helpful assistant.",
    config: ["sendUsage": true, "sendReasoning": true, "temperature": 0.7, "max_tokens": 1500],
    tools: [ItemsUnion.startPart(StartPart(type: "start"))]
))

createAgentCompletion.createAgentCompletion with v5 messages a:
let response = try await client.createAgentCompletion(
    agentId: "785b14e4-61a8-4c03-8028-bf2ba3ae85ff",
    compatibilityMode: CompatibilityMode.aiSdk5,
    agentCompletionRequest: AgentCompletionRequest(
        messages: MessagesUnion.arrayOfMessageV5([MessageV5.userMessageV5(UserMessageV5(
            role: "user",
            parts: [TextPartV5(type: "text", text: "What is Algolia?")]
        ))]),
        id: "test-conversation-id"
    ),
    stream: false,
    cache: false,
    memory: false
)

customDelete.allow del method for a custom path with: let response = try await client.customDelete(path: "test/all", parameters: ["query": AnyCodable("parameters")])

customGet.allow get method for a custom path with: let response = try await client.customGet(path: "test/minimal")

listAgentConversations.listAgentConversations with all paramete:
let response = try await client.listAgentConversations(
    agentId: "785b14e4-61a8-4c03-8028-bf2ba3ae85ff",
    startDate: "2024-01-01",
    endDate: "2024-12-31",
    page: 2,
    limit: 10,
    xAlgoliaSecureUserToken: nil
)

listAgents.e2e list agents: let response = try await client.listAgents(page: 1, limit: 2, providerId: nil)

listProviders.listProviders with pagination: let response = try await client.listProviders(page: 2, limit: 5)
listProviders.e2e list providers: let response = try await client.listProviders(page: 1, limit: 2)

updateAgent.updateAgent with all parameters:
let response = try await client.updateAgent(
    agentId: "785b14e4-61a8-4c03-8028-bf2ba3ae85ff",
    agentConfigUpdate: AgentConfigUpdate(
        name: "updated-agent",
        description: "Updated description",
        providerId: "new-provider-id",
        model: "gpt-4o",
        instructions: "Updated instructions.",
        config: ["temperature": 0.5],
        tools: [ItemsUnion.startPart(StartPart(type: "start"))]
    )
)

updateConfiguration.default:
let response = try await client
    .updateConfiguration(applicationConfigPatch: ApplicationConfigPatch(maxRetentionDays: 30))

init.default: let client = try AgentStudioClient(appID: "ALGOLIA_APPLICATION_ID", apiKey: "ALGOLIA_API_KEY", region: .us)
